commandSamples.command: env DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH=bench/vendor/dawn/out/Release:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH runtime/zig/zig-out/bin/doe-zig-runtime --commands bench/out/apple-metal/smoke/20260406T004234Z/runtime-comparisons.apple.metal.smoke/isolated-runs/doe/upload_write_buffer_64kb/doe.commands.repeat16.json --quirks examples/quirks/intel_gen12_temp_buffer.json --vendor apple --api metal --family apple-gpu --driver 1.0.0 --backend native --backend-lane metal_doe_directional --execute --trace --queue-sync-mode deferred --upload-buffer-usage copy-dst --upload-submit-every 1 --trace-jsonl bench/out/apple-metal/smoke/20260406T004234Z/runtime-comparisons.apple.metal.smoke/isolated-runs/doe/upload_write_buffer_64kb/doe.run000.ndjson --trace-meta bench/out/apple-metal/smoke/20260406T004234Z/runtime-comparisons.apple.metal.smoke/isolated-runs/doe/upload_write_buffer_64kb/doe.run000.meta.json --gpu-timestamp-mode auto --kernel-root bench/kernels --queue-sync-mode deferred --gpu-timestamp-mode off --upload-buffer-usage copy-dst --upload-submit-every 1

env DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH=bench/vendor/dawn/out/Release:$DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH runtime/zig/zig-out/bin/doe-zig-runtime --commands bench/out/apple-metal/smoke/20260406T004234Z/runtime-comparisons.apple.metal.smoke/isolated-runs/doe/upload_write_buffer_64kb/doe.commands.repeat16.json --quirks examples/quirks/intel_gen12_temp_buffer.json --vendor apple --api metal --family apple-gpu --driver 1.0.0 --backend native --backend-lane metal_doe_directional --execute --trace --queue-sync-mode deferred --upload-buffer-usage copy-dst --upload-submit-every 1 --trace-jsonl bench/out/apple-metal/smoke/20260406T004234Z/runtime-comparisons.apple.metal.smoke/isolated-runs/doe/upload_write_buffer_64kb/doe.run001.ndjson --trace-meta bench/out/apple-metal/smoke/20260406T004234Z/runtime-comparisons.apple.metal.smoke/isolated-runs/doe/upload_write_buffer_64kb/doe.run001.meta.json --gpu-timestamp-mode auto --kernel-root bench/kernels --queue-sync-mode deferred --gpu-timestamp-mode off --upload-buffer-usage copy-dst --upload-submit-every 1

runParameters.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workload.comparabilityNotes: Local Metal smoke upload contract with staged copy-dst uploads and matched submit cadence.
workload.name: upload-64kb-smoke
workload.pathAsymmetryNote: Apple Metal UMA may use shared-memory writes without staging-buffer GPU copy, while Dawn delegate performs staging+copy. This hardware-path advantage is non-transferable.
